strategies.name: DonchianObv_RangeBreakout_30m
strategies.description: Chiến lược phá vỡ nền giá giằng co kết hợp xác nhận khối lượng. Sử dụng hàm MAX/MIN để thiết lập kênh giá cản trên/dưới (Donchian Channel). Lệnh đột phá được kích hoạt khi giá phá vỡ kênh và có sự đồng thuận từ dòng tiền lớn thông qua On Balance Volume (OBV).

strategies.name: AroonOscMidprice_TrendSwing_30m
strategies.description: Kết hợp sức mạnh xu hướng từ Aroon Oscillator với vùng cân bằng giá (Midprice) để xác định điểm swing chính trong xu hướng dài hạn, loại bỏ nhiễu của các sóng điều chỉnh nhỏ.

strategies.name: Aroon_Oscillator_Volatility_Envelope
strategies.description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy focusing on structural trend initialization phases in the VN30F1M market. It leverages the Aroon Oscillator to pinpoint exact cyclical trend turnarounds, determining entries when the oscillator breaks from range boundaries into a strong structural regime. To defend against false breakouts during low-liquidity phases, entry is filtered by an adaptive Bollinger Bands bandwidth channel expansion. Fully vectorized, loop-free trailing exits are computed via a rolling extreme channel offset with a normalized ATR buffer.

strategies.name: Aroon_Structural_Chande_Volatility_Regime
strategies.description: A balanced 10-minute timeframe strategy designed to exploit major momentum turning points in the VN30F1M contract while isolating the execution from sideways chop. It monitors multi-day trend cycles using an Aroon Oscillator threshold. Pullback inflection consensus is confirmed using the Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) breaking out of equilibrium boundaries. To insulate the logic from deceptive low-liquidity spikes or thin bars (Volume = 0 scenarios), entries require an active structural volatility filter where short standard deviation stretches past a trailing baseline. Vectorized, loop-free exits are tracked using an adaptive midprice envelope with an ATR offset.

strategies.name: Chande_Volatility_Index_Structural_Regime
strategies.description: A structural 30-minute position intraday strategy built to capture macro-institutional trend breakouts in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks the core directional index regime via Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) trends filtered through a slow Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA). To prevent getting chopped up in narrow sideways markets or experiencing division errors during flat bars (Volume = 0), entries require an absolute volatility expansion trigger. This trigger verifies that standard deviation has expanded past its trailing median anchor. Vectorized trailing exits use an adaptive midprice envelope with an ATR buffer to manage the trade through broad multi-hour swings.

strategies.name: Institutional_Velocity_Dema_Trend
strategies.description: A robust 30-minute position-intraday strategy designed to track long-term institutional trend shifts in the VN30F1M contract. It determines structural value using a long lookback Double Exponential Moving Average (DEMA) to cancel out daytime noise. Real-time trend acceleration is validated using the Momentum (MOM) indicator to prevent entries during late-stage exhaustion or fading trends. Flat-regime protection is explicitly handled by an ADXR filter, which measures changes in trend strength to bypass choppy sideways phases. Exits are structured vectorially via a flexible midprice channel anchor matched with an ATR band.

strategies.name: Institutional_Velocity_Dema_Trend
strategies.description: A robust 30-minute position-intraday strategy designed to track long-term institutional trend shifts in the VN30F1M contract. strategies.description: A robust 30-minute position-intraday strategy designed to track long-term institutional trend shifts in the VN30F1M contract. It determines structural value using a long lookback Double Exponential Moving Average (DEMA) to cancel out daytime noise. Real-time trend acceleration is validated using the Momentum (MOM) indicator to prevent entries during late-stage exhaustion or fading trends. Flat-regime protection is explicitly handled by an ADXR filter, which measures changes in trend strength to bypass choppy sideways phases. Exits are structured vectorially via a flexible midprice channel anchor matched with an ATR band.

strategies.name: Absolute_Price_Oscillator_Volatility_Enforcer
strategies.description: A 10-minute balanced intraday strategy that relies on macro-volatility cycles to filter out toxic ranging periods common in the VN30F1M index. It flags early institutional structural momentum using the Absolute Price Oscillator (APO), avoiding standard correlated trailing indicator overlaps. Trend transitions are verified by cross-checking the structural direction of the Parabolic SAR. To isolate the strategy from the risk of zero-volume or thin compressed bars, entries require a minimum threshold of Normalized Average True Range (NATR). Vectorized trailing exits use an asset-specific ATR step to capture profits safely before intraday expiration.

strategies.name: BOP_Linear_Angle_Swing_Follower
strategies.description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy focusing on structural consensus breakouts. It utilizes the Balance of Power (BOP) indicator to assess pure underlying buying/selling pressure independent of volume anomalies, avoiding division-by-zero risks on flat bars. Trend directionality and trajectory sharpness are validated via the Linear Regression Angle to circumvent choppy trend regimes. Vectorized, loop-free exits are executed using the True Range and historical price extremes to track volatility decay at the close of the candlestick.

strategies.name: Kama_Trend_Plus_DI_Breakout
strategies.description: A 5-minute standard intraday trend-following strategy designed to capture high-velocity extensions out of price ranges. It establishes an adaptive baseline using the Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average (KAMA) to naturally smooth out horizontal chop. Trend strength and directional alignment are validated via the directional movement indicators (plus_di and minus_di) along with an absolute ADX threshold floor to completely protect the strategy against thin trading periods or flat bars (Volume = 0 scenarios). Completely loop-free vectorized exits monitor trailing price channels relative to the current close.

strategies.name: Keltner_Adaptive_Trend_Breakout
strategies.description: An intraday breakout strategy built on the 5-minute timeframe. It identifies market regimes using the ADX indicator to filter out choppy sideways price action. Entry signals are generated when the price breaks out of an adaptive Keltner Channel constructed via an EMA and ATR. Exits are dynamically managed using a trailing Chandelier Exit logic based on historical rolling extremes and ATR to maintain vectorization compatibility.

strategies.name: Keltner_WMA_Momentum_Regime
strategies.description: A structural 30-minute position intraday strategy designed to capture high-probability macro trend legs in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks the institutional value baseline using a medium-period Weighted Moving Average (WMA). Breakout channels are established dynamically around this WMA baseline using the Average True Range (ATR). To prevent the algorithm from being chopped up within the market's common narrow sideways phases and to avoid division traps on flat or zero-volume bars, entries require a momentum velocity confirmation from a medium-period Rate of Change (ROC). Vectorized loop-free exits are executed using trailing price extrema and an ATR buffer.

strategies.name: Linear_Angle_Plus_DI_Swing_Confirmation
strategies.description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy focusing on structural trend initialization phases in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks underlying market trajectory and trend acceleration using the Linear Regression Angle of the close price. Signals are validated and filter-confirmed using the directional movement indicators (plus_di and minus_di) to ensure pure directional force consensus. To prevent the algorithm from entering during choppy sideways regimes or thin zero-volume bars, entries require a minimum normalized ATR filter threshold. Completely loop-free vectorized exits are managed via a rolling median midpoint anchor combined with an ATR offset.

strategies.name: Linear_Slope_CCI_Regime_Position
strategies.description: A structural 30-minute position intraday strategy designed to ride sustained macro momentum expansions on the VN30F1M contract. It tracks underlying market velocity using a long-period Linear Regression Slope to filter out short-term lagging distortions. Directional trends are verified when a medium-period Commodity Channel Index (CCI) breaches its tactical boundaries. To guard against getting chopped up in narrow sideways markets and completely avoid division traps on flat or zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion condition where the short standard deviation breaks past an ATR threshold baseline. Out-of-loop vectorized exits use an adaptive midpoint anchor combined with an ATR offset.

strategies.name: Linear_Slope_Momentum_Reversal
strategies.description: A balanced 10-minute intraday strategy combining structural trend orientation with structural oscillator momentum. It uses the slope of a Linear Regression line to guarantee a strong directional bias, while utilizing the Chande Momentum Oscillator (CMO) to enter during clean momentum surges in the direction of that trend. Exits are handled via dynamic Donchian Channel boundary tracking to secure profits and protect against market reversals without using looping logic.

strategies.name: Micro_Aroon_Oscillator_Alpha_Scalper
strategies.description: An ultra-fast 1-minute scalping strategy engineered to capture high-velocity structural pivots in the VN30F1M contract while isolating execution from horizontal chop. It tracks short-term cyclical turning points using a hyper-short Aroon Oscillator threshold. To protect against fakeouts during compressed sideways regimes and entirely side-step division traps on zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion trigger where the immediate standard deviation breaks past a medium-term moving baseline. Vectorized loop-free exits are executed array-wise using tight rolling channels based on historical extremes.

strategies.name: Midprice_Regression_Oscillator_Trend
strategies.description: A 5-minute standard intraday strategy tracking mathematical price channels via linear regression paths. It defines an institutional trend anchor using the rolling Midprice moving average. Entry boundaries are derived from standard deviations above and below this anchor to capture technical breakouts out of tight squeeze regimes. To bypass choppy sideways noise and avoid division traps on flat or zero-volume bars, entries require confirmation from a sustained trend index (ADXR). Array-based vectorized exits track a dynamic rolling midpoint combined with an ATR offset.

strategies.name: Oscillator_Divergence_Trend_Filter
strategies.description: A 10-minute balanced intraday strategy that captures momentum divergence setups while operating strictly within institutional trend directions. It evaluates macro-trend health via the structural relationship of a double exponential moving average (DEMA). Signal confirmation is triggered by an interaction between the absolute directional index (ADX) measuring structural breakout validity, and the Stochastic Oscillator tracking short-term price exhaustion. Vectorized trailing exits are derived via standard deviations from a middle reference anchor.

strategies.name: Parabolic_SAR_MFI_Structural_Breakout
strategies.description: A 5-minute standard intraday strategy designed to capture robust breakout moves following structural consolidations in the VN30F1M contract. It tracks localized trend directional flips using the Parabolic SAR. To isolate high-probability expansions from deceptive noise and frequent zero-volume phases, entries are validated by volume-weighted momentum filtering via the Money Flow Index (MFI). This prevents division-by-zero crashes while ensuring strong institutional volume participation. Vectorized loop-free exits are processed using an adaptive trailing midpoint channel combined with an ATR offset.

strategies.name: Session_Williams_R_Volatility_Squeeze
strategies.description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy utilizing Williams' %R momentum shifts paired with an asymmetric volatility breakout. It locates key value distribution using a medium-term Triangular Moving Average (TRIMA) baseline. Momentum surges are detected when the fast Williams' %R crosses outside its classic trading bands. To protect against fakeouts during compressed horizontal phases and to circumvent division traps on zero-volume bars, entries require a structural volatility expansion condition where the short standard deviation breaks past an adjusted ATR threshold channel. Out-of-loop vectorized exits track price deviations away from rolling structural midpoints.

strategies.name: Triple_Exponential_CCI_Volatility_Regime
strategies.description: A balanced 10-minute intraday strategy tracking momentum continuations on the VN30F1M contract. It defines the core market bias using a medium-period Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA). Velocity transformations are tracked when a smoothed Commodity Channel Index (CCI) crosses beyond its typical operational boundaries. To safeguard execution capital from toxic sideways ranges and completely avoid division traps on thin or zero-volume bars, entries require structural filter verification from a Normalized ATR (NATR) threshold curve. Vectorized, loop-free exits are anchored around trailing price extremes.

strategies.name: Triple_Exponential_Moving_Average_CCI_Swing
strategies.description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy designed to harvest clean structural momentum arcs on the VN30F1M index while filtering out false trend starts. It tracks the institutional direction baseline using a medium-period Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA) to mitigate lag without sacrificing stability. Direct cyclical momentum reversals are tracked via a smoothed Commodity Channel Index (CCI). To insulate the strategy from flat, low-liquidity zones or thin bars, execution requires a definitive structural volatility expansion confirmation where the fast price standard deviation breaks out past its trailing baseline. Array-based vectorized exits use trailing price channels anchored to standard ATR multipliers.

strategies.name: Triple_Exponential_Volatility_Channel
strategies.description: A high-quality 15-minute swing intraday strategy utilizing a Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA) channel envelope. The strategy addresses the distinct regime traits of the VN30F1M contract by measuring structural volatility width via a normalized standard deviation filter to bypass choppy consolidation zones. Positions are entered when price aggressively exits the structural TEMA channel envelope. Vectorized tracking exits are established via an adaptive dynamic mid-price anchor combined with an ATR factor to guarantee safe intraday execution.

strategies.name: Triple_Moving_Average_ADX_Regime_Position
strategies.description: A 30-minute position intraday strategy designed to ride major macro trend shifts on the VN30F1M contract. It tracks institutional structural trends using a Triple Exponential Moving Average (TEMA) basis line to filter out intraday noise. Real-time directional strength is validated via the interaction of Plus/Minus Directional Indicators alongside an ADX threshold floor. This multi-layered filtering completely eliminates bad entries during choppy, low-liquidity horizontal range regimes (avoiding zero-volume or flat bar traps). Completely loop-free vectorized trailing exits utilize an adaptive midprice anchor coupled with a standard ATR offset.

strategies.name: Volatility_Squeeze_Kama_Trend
strategies.description: A high-quality swing intraday strategy designed for the 15-minute timeframe. It utilizes a Bollinger Bands and Keltner Channel squeeze comparison to identify structural consolidation regimes and prevent whipsaws. Once the squeeze releases (volatility expansion), the Kaufman Adaptive Moving Average (KAMA) defines the structural trend direction to establish positions. Clean vector-based exits are triggered when the price crosses the standard trailing Parabolic SAR, optimizing profit capture over broader intraday moves.
